zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph De Staunton於大約1332年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey de Staunton31歲，母親Lady Joan De Loudham32歲。他於大約1362年與Hellena在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓結婚。他去世於1371年享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph De Staunton was born about 1332, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Joan De Loudham, was 32. He married Hellena about 1362, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England. He died in 1371, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph De Staunton est né environ 1332, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Loudham, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hellena environ 1362, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1371, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph De Staunton um 1332 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey de Staunton 31 und seine Mutter Lady Joan De Loudham 32. Er hat um 1362 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England Hellena geheiratet. Er starb 1371 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Staunton è nato il circa 1332 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan De Loudham, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Hellena circa 1362, nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England. Morì nel 1371, all'età di 40 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph De Staunton(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Staunton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan De Loudham(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1362년 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 Hellena(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1371년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Staunton nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Loudham, tinha 32 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph De Staunton родился около 1332 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Staunton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Loudham, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hellena около 1362 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он умер в 1371 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph De Staunton nació aproximadamente 1332, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Joan De Loudham, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hellena aproximadamente 1362, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1371, a la edad de 40 años.
